species: K. phaffii is a suitable host for prolamin production.
disease_state: A sequence search revealed 19 coeliac disease epitopes...
sample_source: genomic S. cereale cv. Elias DNA
The Sec2 gene was PCR-amplified with a high-fidelity polymerase directly from genomic S. cereale cv. Elias DNA...
cell_line: Three biological replicates of K. phaffii gSec and one sample of K. phaffii ΔgSec...
strain: a 75k γ-secalin expressing strain was verified through immunoblotting and termed K. phaffii Z-gSec.
